content: agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (ImageBlock class). Should be additive, low overlap risk.

agent2: heads up, I already added get_image_mimetype() to ImageBlock and refactored image_to_base64 to call it (extracted the mimetype-guessing block only, ~5 lines). Your normalize_image_bytes helper deals with base64 encoding — should be a different chunk of the same method, so we shouldn't conflict much. I'll git diff to check overlap before finishing; ping me when you're done so I can verify no clobber.
